calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Daniel Cheung, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
Carlos Membrano, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Solonial Murphy.

Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation's complaint was filed on August 6, 2018.
Defendant Solonial Murphy's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on August 22, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on August 24, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, September 10, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation, and against defendant Solonial Murphy, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $327.94.
Costs - $240.00.

Total - $567.94.

Furthermore, plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 350 Ellis Street, Unit 4F, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The rental agreement is canceled.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported.

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present, represented by Carlos Mombrano.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Solonial Murphy is present.
Attorney Jason Truong appearing for defendant in limited scope.

Litigants and counsel hold settlement discussions. This case does NOT settle. The trial date of September 10, 2018 remains on calendar.
